run_all_tests_command.command_line: ./gradlew test --rerun; _EC=$?; python3 -c "import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, glob; root=ET.Element('testsuites'); [root.append(ET.parse(f).getroot()) for f in glob.glob('build/test-results/test/TEST-*.xml')]; ET.ElementTree(root).write('{tests_report_file}', xml_declaration=True, encoding='unicode')"; exit $_EC

run_specified_tests_command.command_line: TESTS_ARGS=$(echo {tests_list} | tr ' ' '\n' | sed 's/^/--tests /'); ./gradlew test $TESTS_ARGS --rerun; _EC=$?; python3 -c "import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, glob; root=ET.Element('testsuites'); [root.append(ET.parse(f).getroot()) for f in glob.glob('build/test-results/test/TEST-*.xml')]; ET.ElementTree(root).write('{tests_report_file}', xml_declaration=True, encoding='unicode')"; exit $_EC

run_all_tests_with_coverage_command.command_line: ./gradlew test jacocoTestReport --rerun; _EC=$?; python3 -c "import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, glob; root=ET.Element('testsuites'); [root.append(ET.parse(f).getroot()) for f in glob.glob('build/test-results/test/TEST-*.xml')]; ET.ElementTree(root).write('{tests_report_file}', xml_declaration=True, encoding='unicode')" && python3 scripts/jacoco_to_lcov.py build/reports/jacoco/test/jacocoTestReport.xml {tests_coverage_report_file}; exit $_EC

run_specified_tests_with_coverage_comman.command_line: TESTS_ARGS=$(echo {tests_list} | tr ' ' '\n' | sed 's/^/--tests /'); ./gradlew test $TESTS_ARGS jacocoTestReport --rerun; _EC=$?; python3 -c "import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, glob; root=ET.Element('testsuites'); [root.append(ET.parse(f).getroot()) for f in glob.glob('build/test-results/test/TEST-*.xml')]; ET.ElementTree(root).write('{tests_report_file}', xml_declaration=True, encoding='unicode')" && python3 scripts/jacoco_to_lcov.py build/reports/jacoco/test/jacocoTestReport.xml {tests_coverage_report_file}; exit $_EC
